title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 21: Tian Zifang
description: Chapter 21 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 21 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: Confucius said to Lao Dan: 'I'm fifty-one years old, and I haven't yet heard the Way.' Lao Dan said: 'If you had pursued the Way through what should be sought for, you'd have found it long ago.'
